Name: Red Cobra Triad
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

With their roots on Terra in the Asian region, the Triads and Tongs of today are typically involved in drugs, prostitution, gambling and other similar businesses, operating on the wrong side of the law.

Reputation with the criminal underworld isn't about cordial relations. After all, such organisations are often in conflict. Rather, it represents a Mercenary Company's criminal street cred, or conversely their actions acting as the various Houses police force.
ReputationStatements: Most of the Triad wants you dead, Commander. Perform this task for us, and just maybe you can regain some value to us.
Mercenaries come and go. The Red Cobra remains.
Quick strike. Hard exit. We are not paying you for any heroics.
The Red Cobra has plenty of work, if you so desire it mercenary. Leave your morals at the door and do not ask unnecessary questions.
The Red Cobra rewards consistency. You are becoming consistent.
You understand the value of discretion, Commander. That quality has kept many people alive... and wealthy.
You have served the Red Cobra well, Commander. Fear and firepower are valuable assets and well worth your premium rate.
MissionSuccessStatements: Clean work. The kind that does not require explanation afterward. The Triad appreciates efficiency.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The losses are significant. Fortunately for you, they are not fatal.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Failure can be expensive. Betrayal is considerably more expensive.
